allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const content = fs.readFileSync\(''src/data/blogs.ts'', ''utf8''\); const lines = content.split\(''\\n''\); for\(let i = 260; i < 275; i++\) { console.log\(i+1 + '': '' + JSON.stringify\(lines[i]\)\); }")

Bash(powershell -Command 'try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://localhost:4322/'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \('\\''Status: '\\'' + $r.StatusCode + '\\'' | Length: '\\'' + $r.Content.Length + '\\'' chars'\\''\) } catch { Write-Output \('\\''ERROR: '\\'' + $_.Exception.Message\) }')

Bash(powershell -Command 'try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://[::1]:4322/'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \('\\''IPv6 Status: '\\'' + $r.StatusCode + '\\'' | Title found: '\\'' + \($r.Content -match '\\''<title>\([^<]+\)</title>'\\'' | Out-Null; $matches[1]\)\) } catch { Write-Output \('\\''IPv6 ERROR: '\\'' + $_.Exception.Message\) }')

Bash(powershell -Command 'try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri '\\''http://[::1]:4322/'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \('\\''Status: '\\'' + $r.StatusCode + '\\'' | Length: '\\'' + $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \('\\''ERR: '\\'' + $_.Exception.Message\) }')

Bash(curl -sL -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -o /tmp/pexels_test/test.jpg -w 'HTTP %{http_code} | size=%{size_download} | content-type=%{content_type}\\n' https://www.pexels.com/search/rfid%20access%20card/ --max-time 30 -I)

Bash(curl -sL -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -o /tmp/access3/pixabay_test.html -w 'HTTP %{http_code} | size=%{size_download} | content-type=%{content_type}\\n' https://pixabay.com/images/search/access%20control%20card/ --max-time 30)
Bash(cp "RFID ring/10.18戒指-罗/RFID NFC Ceramic Ring tag.jpg" "public/images/products/nfc-ceramic-ring-main.jpg")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const f = fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/rfid-technology.astro','utf8'\); const openSections = \(f.match\(/<section/g\) || []\).length; const closeSections = \(f.match\(/<\\/section>/g\) || []\).length; const openDivs = \(f.match\(/<div/g\) || []\).length; const closeDivs = \(f.match\(/<\\/div>/g\) || []\).length; const openH2 = \(f.match\(/<h2/g\) || []\).length; const closeH2 = \(f.match\(/<\\/h2>/g\) || []\).length; console.log\('sections:', openSections, '/', closeSections\); console.log\('divs:', openDivs, '/', closeDivs\); console.log\('h2:', openH2, '/', closeH2\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const f = fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/rfid-frequency-guide.astro','utf8'\); const o = \(p\) => \(f.match\(p\) || []\).length; console.log\('sections:', o\(/<section/g\), '/', o\(/<\\/section>/g\)\); console.log\('divs:', o\(/<div/g\), '/', o\(/<\\/div>/g\)\); console.log\('h2:', o\(/<h2/g\), '/', o\(/<\\/h2>/g\)\); console.log\('tables:', o\(/<table/g\), '/', o\(/<\\/table>/g\)\); console.log\('details:', o\(/<details/g\), '/', o\(/<\\/details>/g\)\); console.log\('lines:', f.split\('\\n'\).length\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); ['src/pages/rfid-frequency-guide.astro','src/pages/rfid-technology.astro','src/data/blogs.ts'].forEach\(p => { try { const f = fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\); const o = \(re\) => \(f.match\(re\) || []\).length; console.log\(p, '-> lines:', f.split\('\\n'\).length, 'sections:', o\(/<section/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/section>/g\), 'divs:', o\(/<div/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/div>/g\), 'a-tags:', o\(/<a /g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/a>/g\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(p, 'ERR', e.message\); } }\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const f = fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/rfid-chip-comparison.astro','utf8'\); const o = \(re\) => \(f.match\(re\) || []\).length; console.log\('lines:', f.split\('\\n'\).length, 'sections:', o\(/<section/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/section>/g\), 'divs:', o\(/<div/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/div>/g\), 'tables:', o\(/<table/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/table>/g\), 'h2:', o\(/<h2/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/h2>/g\)\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); ['src/pages/rfid-chip-comparison.astro','src/pages/rfid-technology.astro','src/pages/rfid-frequency-guide.astro','src/data/blogs.ts'].forEach\(p => { try { const f = fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\); const o = \(re\) => \(f.match\(re\) || []\).length; console.log\(p.split\('/'\).pop\(\), '-> lines:', f.split\('\\n'\).length, 'sections:', o\(/<section/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/section>/g\), 'divs:', o\(/<div/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/div>/g\), 'a-tags:', o\(/<a /g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/a>/g\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(p, 'ERR', e.message\); } }\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const f = fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/rfid-vs-nfc-vs-bluetooth.astro','utf8'\); const o = \(re\) => \(f.match\(re\) || []\).length; console.log\('lines:', f.split\('\\n'\).length, 'sections:', o\(/<section/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/section>/g\), 'divs:', o\(/<div/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/div>/g\), 'tables:', o\(/<table/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/table>/g\), 'h2:', o\(/<h2/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/h2>/g\)\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); ['src/pages/rfid-vs-nfc-vs-bluetooth.astro','src/pages/rfid-chip-comparison.astro','src/pages/rfid-frequency-guide.astro','src/pages/rfid-technology.astro','src/data/blogs.ts'].forEach\(p => { try { const f = fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\); const o = \(re\) => \(f.match\(re\) || []\).length; console.log\(p.split\('/'\).pop\(\), '->', 'lines:', f.split\('\\n'\).length, 'sec:', o\(/<section/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/section>/g\), 'div:', o\(/<div/g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/div>/g\), 'a:', o\(/<a /g\)+'/'+ o\(/<\\/a>/g\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(p, 'ERR', e.message\); } }\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('src/data/products.ts','utf8'\); console.log\('lines:', src.split\('\\n'\).length\); try { const noExp = src.replace\(/^export /gm,''\); require\('vm'\).createScript\('\(function\(\){ var Product=null,CategoryType=null; ' + noExp.replace\(/^import[^;]+;/gm,''\).replace\(/interface [A-Z][a-zA-Z]+ \\{[^}]*\\}/gs,''\).replace\(/type [A-Z][a-zA-Z]+ =[^;]+;/gs,''\) + '}\)\(\)'\); console.log\('Parse: OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Parse error:', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); }")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('src/data/products.ts','utf8'\); const open = \(src.match\(/\\{/g\)||[]\).length; const close = \(src.match\(/\\}/g\)||[]\).length; const ob = \(src.match\(/\\[/g\)||[]\).length; const cb = \(src.match\(/\\]/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\('curly:', open, '/', close, 'square:', ob, '/', cb\); const slugs = \(src.match\(/slug:\\s*[\\"']\([a-z0-9-]+\)[\\"']/g\) || []\).length; console.log\('slug count:', slugs\);")

Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const s = fs.readFileSync\('src/data/products.ts','utf8'\); const lines = s.split\('\\n'\); const findings = []; lines.forEach\(\(line, i\) => { if \(line.startsWith\('        content:'\) || line.startsWith\('        title:'\)\) { const m = line.match\(/content: \\"\([^\\\\\\\\]*[^\\\\\\\\\\"]\)\\\\\\"[a-zA-Z]/\); const m2 = line.match\(/[a-zA-Z]\\\\\\"[a-zA-Z]/\); if \(m2 && !line.includes\('“'\) && !line.includes\('”'\)\) { findings.push\(\(i+1\) + ': ' + line.substring\(0,120\)\); } }}\); findings.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(f => console.log\(f\)\);")
